title: Creating Daily News Skill for AI/Tech Headlines
job:
Create a new skill called `daily-news` that searches for the latest AI/tech news and summarizes the top 3 stories.

The skill should:
1. Create `skills/daily-news/SKILL.md` with proper frontmatter (name: daily-news, description: "Fetches and summarizes the top AI/tech news stories") and usage documentation
2. Create `skills/daily-news/news.sh` - a bash script that:
   - Uses the Hacker News API (https://hacker-news.firebaseio.com/v0/topstories.json) to get top stories
   - Fetches details of top stories and filters for tech/AI related ones
   - Outputs a formatted summary of the top 3 AI/tech news stories with title, link, and score
3. Make the script executable with proper error handling
4. Activate the skill by creating a symlink: `ln -s ../daily-news skills/active/daily-news`
5. Test the skill by running `skills/daily-news/news.sh` and verify it outputs properly formatted news

Context: This is a test of the full thepopebot system with GLM-4.7. The skill should be fully functional when complete.
